MINI MINUTES: This matter was not heard. The tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT OLEGS PIMENOVS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To The Settlement Agreement And Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment Of The Parties is GRANTED as requested. Mr. Wood Ccunsel for Defendant was instructed to submit an order tracking the ruling of the Court. Proposed judgment submitted. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Off Calendar Oct-13-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Alexander G. Vaisman; 415-225-7581; specially appearing on behalf of attorney Joseph Wood, as counsel for defendant and cross-complainant Olegs Pimenovs.

No other appearances. Not contested. Counsel appears seeking clarification as to the court's tentative ruling. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT OLEGS PIMENOVS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OF THE PARTIES is OFF CALENDAR. No valid proof of service on file. Proof of service indicates that this motion, signed on September 15, 2022, was served on March 15, 2022. Additionally, no courtesy copies of the moving papers received. SFLR 2.7B.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
